name: Dual Avatar Return
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>双</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>再</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>来</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 "Dual Avatar" monster in your GY; Special Summon it, then if its original Level is 4 or lower, you can Special Summon 1 "Dual Avatar Spirit Token" (Warrior/LIGHT/Level 2/ATK 0/DEF 0). You can only activate 1 "Dual Avatar Return" per turn.
eff: Target 1 "Dual Avatar" monster in your GY; Special Summon it, then if its original Level is 4 or lower, you can Special Summon 1 "Dual Avatar Spirit Token" (Warrior/LIGHT/Level 2/ATK 0/DEF 0). You can only activate 1 "Dual Avatar Return" per turn.
